What I've Built
Projects
01
HTMLCSS

Personal Portfolio Website

Designed and built a responsive personal portfolio website to showcase academic projects and technical skills. Implemented clean semantic HTML with CSS styling ensuring cross-browser compatibility and mobile-friendly layout.

02
Python

Student Grade Calculator

Built a command-line Python application to calculate and display student grades based on marks input by the user. Applied core Python concepts including functions, loops, conditionals, and file I/O.

03
HTMLCSSJavaScript

Basic To-Do List Web App

Created an interactive to-do list application with add, delete, and mark-complete functionality using vanilla JavaScript. Focused on DOM manipulation and event handling.
